setting.title: Serial Terminal
entryView.title: Serial Port Resource Manager
setting.serialPort.configurations.title: Serial Port Configurations
setting.serialPort.configurations.descri:
Configuration options when opening a serial port. You can add additional options here.
For example `115200n81`
 - Baud rate `115200`
 - Parity `n(n|e|o)` where `n` means none, default is `n`
 - Data bits `8(5|6|7|8)`, default is `8`
 - Stop bits `1(1|1.5|2)`, default is `1`
setting.log.savePath.title: Log Path
setting.log.savePath.description:
Set the directory path for saving logs. Changes take effect after reloading the window.
 - Path format can be: `c:\log` or `/C:/log`
 - If set to empty, it will be automatically set to `$HOME/serialTerminal/log`
 - Click `Reset Setting` to reset this to the default path
 - If the configured directory does not exist, the extension will try to create it
setting.log.autoSave.title: Auto Save Log
setting.log.timestamp.enable.title: Auto Add Timestamp
setting.log.timestamp.duration.title: Timestamp Interval
setting.log.timestamp.duration.descripti: The minimum interval between timestamps when automatically adding timestamps, in nanoseconds. Default is 20ms or 20000000ns.
setting.notebook.savePath.title: Notebook Save Path
setting.notebook.savePath.description:
Set the directory path for saving Notebook files. Changes take effect after reloading the window.
 - Path format can be: `c:\notebook` or `/C:/notebook`
 - If set to empty, it will be automatically set to `$HOME/serialTerminal/notebook`
 - Click `Reset Setting` to reset this to the default path
 - If the configured directory does not exist, the extension will try to create it
